author: quietsmile
name: Complementary Training + Backoff N-gram Mixer (Reproduction)
blurb: Reproduction of PR #803's complementary training approach on 8xL20Z (H100). Bigram-weighted loss reweighting (COMPLEMENT_ALPHA=0.5) trains the neural model to specialize on tokens n-gram caches can't predict. BackoffNgramMixer (orders 2-10, 4M hash buckets) with entropy-adaptive alpha (0.20+0.55*sigmoid(2*(H-3.0))). Legal score-first AdamW TTT (4 epochs, lr=5e-4, freeze first 2 blocks). Int6 mixed quantization + lzma. Evaluated with stride=128.
